description: Create a content-based recommendation engine for Sakila customers using MySQL Workbench to generate three film recommendations for every customer based on their viewing history. Create a table named `customer_recommendations` with columns `customer_id` (smallint), `film_id` (smallint), `rank_score` (tinyint), and `generated_at` (timestamp). Develop and execute a stored procedure `sp_generate_recommendations` to populate this table. For each customer, the procedure must identify their favorite category (most rented, alphabetical tie-break), select films from that category they have not previously rented, and rank the top three candidates by `rental_rate` DESC and `title` ASC. Export the resulting recommendations, including `customer_id`, `first_name`, `last_name`, `film_title`, and `rank_score`, to `/home/ga/Documents/exports/recommendations_batch_01.csv`. Login credentials: host=localhost, user=ga, password=password123.
